question: Which product categories bring in the most revenue?
sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.status IN ('Complete', 'Shipped') GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 15
analyst_notes: Category revenue uses the standard revenue definition (Complete + Shipped). Category lives on products, so join through product_id; do not use inventory_items.product_category here — it denormalizes the same value but adds a wider join for nothing.
author: claude-draft
